title: APEX Policy Property Map (L1m)
description: Machine-readable governance compliance matrix emitted alongside 04-implementation-plan.md as 04-policy-property-map.json. Always produced — in light governance mode, the prose H2 'Governance Compliance Matrix' section is skipped but this JSON file is still emitted so 06b/06t and policy-precheck-subagent (L3) can attest Deny-effect policies deterministically. Mirrors L1m in the four-layer governance attestation chain (L0 envelope → L1 matrix → L2 attestation → L3 live precheck).

governance_depth.description: Source mode that produced this map. 'light' may omit detailed evidence/rationale per policy but MUST still include every Deny-effect entry.

constraints_ref.description: Pointer to the source 04-governance-constraints.json so reviewers can audit upstream provenance.

policies.description: One entry per effective policy assignment that the implementation must satisfy. MUST include every Deny-effect policy from 04-governance-constraints.json even in light mode.

target_property.description: The exact resource type + property path the policy enforces. Used by L2 validate-subagent attestation.

expected_value.description: Required scalar/array/object the resource must declare.

evidence_required.description: Where Step 5 must surface the attestation (e.g. inline bicep param, terraform locals).

rationale.description: WAF pillar mapping and reason. Optional in light mode; required for Deny-effect entries in full mode.
